Tests multiplication of positive and negative infinity in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of multiplying `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` by `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY` in JavaScript. The assertion verifies that the result of this multiplication is `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`, which is consistent with the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. This test ensures that the JavaScript environment correctly implements this aspect of number operations. The code is narrow in functionality, focusing specifically on validating a single arithmetic operation involving special numeric values.
